title: Table GSI integration
description: Given a table with GSIs attached, when records are put or deleted, GSIs should be automatically maintained. Query via GSI returns full records from the table. Spec: features/core/table_gsi_integration.feature

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Status: in progress. Did: starting GSI integration. Next: wire GSI maintenance in Table. Blockers: none.
